# Daily Flow Summary

All-in sprint day. Told Benvolio the truth and he immediately got to work on infrastructure. Had a staging Kubernetes cluster running within two hours.

Afternoon sprint with Juliet polishing the presentation. Revenue projections: $2.4M Year 1, scaling to $15M+ by Year 3. Nurse Angela got us on the agenda as Strategic Technology Review.

Evening rehearsal went well. Demo running at 0.3ms latency, 10K req/s. Benvolio added auto-scaling and a fallback region. Professor Lawrence confirmed moderation.
